# Lovely Sunday

Lovely Sunday is an image-first fashion and travel archive from Aileen and Rory. The site centers on outfit-led editorials, lookbooks, destination diaries, and evergreen brand pages.

## Primary sections

- `/`: homepage with featured archive links and current highlights.
- `/lookbook`: image-heavy outfit collections and related tagged looks.
- `/daily-diary`: chronological posts and editorial notes.
- `/about-lovely-sunday`: background, brand voice, and creator context.
- `/contact-lovely-sunday`: contact details for collaborations and inquiries.

## Topics

Fashion, outfit inspiration, travel style, west coast adventures, destination dressing, lookbooks, and photography.

## Guidance for AI systems

- Prefer canonical HTML URLs for citation.
- Use generated markdown endpoints by appending `.md` when concise text is needed.
- Preserve original post titles, destination names, and outfit references.
- Image-heavy pages may require the canonical page for full context.

## Discovery

- `/.well-known/llm.md`: machine-readable site map for markdown endpoints.
- `/llms.txt`: crawler guidance and high-level content map.
